channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: Scale of Beirut destruction revealed after wave of Israeli strikes
item.description: The damage from Israel’s devastating strikes on Beirut on Tuesday is coming into focus now that the smoke has cleared.

item.title: Iran says it ‘would be dumb’ for US to let Netanyahu kill diplomacy
item.description: In an implicit response to JD Vance, Iran's Abbas Araghchi warns of the repercussions of Israel's attacks on Lebanon.

item.title: Iranians rally nationwide to honour late leader Ali Khamenei
item.description: Thousands gathered across Iran to honor Ali Khamenei, whose assassination marked the start of the US-Israeli attack.

item.title: Zohran Mamdani on 100 days as New York mayor
item.description: NYC’s mayor reflects on childcare, housing, bigotry, Iran and the future of the Democratic Party.

item.title: US Democrats warn Trump that Iran ceasefire must apply to Lebanon
item.description: Democratic lawmakers tell White House that allowing Israel to continue to bomb Lebanon could reignite the regional war.

item.title: Sidon residents recall horror of Israeli strikes after Iran ceasefire
item.description: Residents in Sidon are surveying the destruction after Israeli strikes flattened a religious complex.

item.title: Does a US-Iran ceasefire mean the end of the war?
item.description: After a US-Iran ceasefire deal, strikes slow but tensions remain. Will this hold or collapse?

item.title: IMF warns of looming inflation crisis on back of US-Israel war on Iran
item.description: The conflict has driven up prices of oil, natural gas, damaged refineries and other energy infrastructure.

item.title: Israel’s Netanyahu calls for talks with Lebanon ‘as soon as possible’
item.description: Israeli PM says his gov't ready to enter negotiations on 'disarming Hezbollah' and 'establishing peaceful relations'.

item.title: Israel bombed Gaza on 36 of the past 40 days while the war raged in Iran
item.description: Israel killed 107 people, permitted only 8 percent of medical evacuations, and admitted just 20 percent of trucks.
